releases.name: Project X v4.0 Release 0
releases.summary: Defines the technical and philosophical foundation for Project X as a Teaching Operating System.

releases.name: Project X v4.0 Release 0.1
releases.summary: Separates user help, engineering documentation and published documents into distinct areas.

releases.name: Project X v4.0 Release 0.4.1
releases.summary: Connects the Curriculum Centre Lesson Library to the canonical imported curriculum repository so Lesson Tracker units, lessons, resources, delivery records and assessment summaries are available through one source of truth.

releases.name: Project X v4.0 Release 0.4.2
releases.summary: Adds persistent Year Group filtering across the Curriculum Dashboard, Units Library, Lessons Library and Planner so the 2025-2026 lesson repository can be navigated by teaching cohort without duplicating curriculum data.
